Category.name: Work
Category.description: Research, courses, teaching assistantship, and grant applications.

Task.description: Weekly meeting prep: Slides on experiments
Book flight with university travel agent
Coordinate with group on dinner location
Schedule oil change and tire rotation
Clean interior and vacuum floor mats
Review asset allocation across all accounts
Consult with advisor on retirement contributions
Replace burnt out light bulb in hallway
Wash and store winter heavy coats
Donate unused items to local shelter
Set 'No Screens' rule 1 hour before bed
Schedule eye exam for new prescription

Category.name: Learning

Task.description: Read 'Attention is All You Need' paper again
Read one news article on Le Monde
Review best practices for two-factor authentication
Source sushi-grade fish in Toronto (St. Lawrence Market)
Watch tutorial on Nigiri shaping techniques

Category.description: Hobbies, creative pursuits, and social leisure.

Task.description: Research best local spots for low light pollution
Watch tutorial on 'Long Exposure' settings for night sky
Buy seeds for Basil, Mint, and Rosemary
Identify window with the best south-facing sunlight
